name_en: Style No.6827 🪡MCM👜 New TRACY Vintage Flap Handbag/Crossbody: Simple and sharp lines, minimalist versatile shape, creating a refined look... Classic MCM pattern elements present a unique layered visual effect. Designed for daily wear or quick trips, the lightweight shape. Laurel lock, high-profile interpretation of MCM identity, unique retro style. Equipped with an adjustable shoulder strap, lightweight and convenient, changing different looks. Internal details/structured and simple interior, easily accommodating daily essentials. Dimensions approx: 18x14x6cm
